changes.what: Fixed robots/sitemap and submitted in GSC
Granted GA4 + Search Console read access
Author bios + credentials on key pages
Published llms.txt + entity catalog for AI crawlers

access.dayOneTactic: Use commercial-funding-partners-6138 provider attachment evidence as the current readback source while deciding the canonical CFP tenant/slug before any provider writes.
access.proofRequired: Broker reconciliation readback shows one canonical CFP tenant/alias map and provider rows attached without duplicate setup.
access.whatProves: Existing provider evidence and restored New Reward broker readback prove CFP has provider/control-plane rows for the major lanes.
access.whatCannotProve: It does not resolve the duplicate tenant/slug governance decision or every lane-specific fresh provider readback.
access.notes: Broker readback restored; remaining risk is governance and fresh readback coverage, not missing provider setup.

crawl.dayOneTactic: Monitor GSC/GA4 for service-page entrances and run a full sitemap corpus plus URL Inspection follow-up after the redirect signal window.
crawl.proofRequired: Full sitemap crawl and GSC URL Inspection sample remain clean after the A6 redirect repair.
crawl.whatProves: A6 equipment-financing shortcut and typo variants now redirect to the canonical service page; priority public verifiers returned zero failures and zero warnings.
crawl.whatCannotProve: It does not prove full sitemap corpus health or fresh GSC URL Inspection state after the repair.
crawl.notes: A6 shortcut 404 is repaired and verified; score remains capped below full because full corpus/provider index checks were not rerun.

ia.dayOneTactic: Use GSC page/query data and the sitemap corpus to prioritize internal links from service hubs to proof assets and contact paths.
ia.proofRequired: Rendered crawl export showing priority pages linked from relevant hubs with canonical final URLs and no orphaned key assets.
ia.whatProves: Sitemap and public signals confirm service, case-study, contact, AI artifact, and WordPress sitemap surfaces are reachable.
ia.whatCannotProve: It does not prove every internal link, breadcrumb, or body CTA is correctly weighted across the site.
ia.notes: Existing parity evidence says major body backlink repairs were completed; current run did not recrawl every body link.

demand.dayOneTactic: Turn GSC high-impression low-CTR queries and rank-tracker wins into title/meta and internal-link edits for priority pages.
demand.proofRequired: Before/after query-page table plus retest window showing CTR, impressions, and rank movement.
demand.whatProves: GSC and GA4 exports provide last-7 and last-28 day search/traffic windows; DataForSEO rank tracker snapshot exists from June 12.
demand.whatCannotProve: It does not prove fresh keyword expansion, current SERP competitors, or prompt-derived demand beyond saved snapshots.
demand.notes: Last 7 export days: 74 clicks, 6025 impressions, 1.23 percent CTR, avg position 15.1.

proof.dayOneTactic: Audit older pages/posts for outdated language, missing proof context, weak authorship/date treatment, and mismatched CFP terminology.
proof.proofRequired: Content QA table with fixed or intentionally retained pages and a fresh crawl/indexability readback.
proof.whatProves: Homepage, equipment financing, case studies, contact, Pulse, and AI artifact surfaces are live and public-readable.
proof.whatCannotProve: It does not prove all older posts, author/date displays, proof source handling, or client-sensitive proof guardrails are clean.
proof.notes: May/June prepared proof assets are source context until reflected on production URLs and launch ledgers.

authority.dayOneTactic: Prepare approval-gated outreach/citation targets from the Ahrefs evidence, excluding spammy or paid-link patterns.
authority.proofRequired: Approved target list, sent/earned link ledger, and later Ahrefs/GSC link readback.
authority.whatProves: Ahrefs authority baseline exists: CFP DR 12, 412 referring domains, 3745 backlinks; equipmentleases.com comparison DR 32.
authority.whatCannotProve: It does not prove outreach has been approved, sent, earned, or cleaned up after purchased-link risk.
authority.notes: Authority gap is material but should not be solved with duplicate directories or risky paid placements.

local.dayOneTactic: Bing Places readback/import: Open existing Bing Places dashboard, search before create, import from Google only if no duplicate and ownership path is clear. Review/reputation action plan: Draft compliant ask cadence and response policy; do not send asks without recipient/source approval. Citation duplicates/conflicts: Use ledger to classify each citation as keep/repair/claim/ignore/paid-hold; avoid duplicate listings. Local pages and service-area fit: Use Utah page proof, then repair/refine remaining local/referral surface fit with live QA.
local.proofRequired: GBP field readback, canonical NAP/local-page proof, review-count API or manual proof, Bing Places readback/import proof, citation cleanup ledger, Zernio mapping reconciliation, and explicit Apple exclusion.
local.whatProves: Global account registry indicates GBP/Bing Places access paths exist and CFP local/entity work has historical evidence.
local.whatCannotProve: It does not prove the current GBP website field, category/services, location status, reviews, or duplicate state.
local.notes: Runtime local-entity packet applied after James approved manual readback/repair. Current GBP location, website, profile quality, NAP, and seven-review baseline are verified or partially verified. Checklist: 9 done, 6 open/excluded, 0 blocked. Remaining metrics: Bing Places profile state: missing_readback; Current review body/reply/recency export: blocked_provider; Citation duplicate repair receipts: missing_execution; Zernio mapping verified state: partial_or_missing; Review/reputation outreach receipts: missing_execution Apple Business Connect is excluded by user for this run. Do not create duplicate local listings.

aigeo.dayOneTactic: Run a cost-capped prompt/citation baseline from GSC, DataForSEO, and sales questions, then build cited-source gap actions.
aigeo.proofRequired: Prompt run with answer visibility, mention/citation counts, cited source ledger, and retest dates.
aigeo.whatProves: AI/GDO artifacts and robots permissions are publicly readable and mention CFP/equipment financing/contact where relevant.
aigeo.whatCannotProve: It does not prove LLM answers cite or mention CFP; June 12 rank-tracker/AI snapshot showed AI Overview presence but family citations at 0.
aigeo.notes: Artifacts are live; answer visibility is still constrained.

perf.dayOneTactic: Use existing GTmetrix/CrUX proof to prepare CLS/template fixes, then rerun PSI/CrUX/GTmetrix after quota or approved credit use.
perf.proofRequired: Fresh PSI/CrUX/GTmetrix readback showing CLS and key template metrics improved or explained.
perf.whatProves: Current PSI API attempt returned quota-exhausted, while prior GTmetrix/CrUX evidence is available in the CFP audit packet.
perf.whatCannotProve: It does not prove fresh PSI lab scores today; prior field evidence still needs current validation after quota is available.
perf.notes: PSI returned quota exceeded on June 15; prior evidence noted GTmetrix A/95 but URL-level CrUX CLS risk.

trust.dayOneTactic: Run axe/Pa11y, Nu HTML/resource checks, and SecurityHeaders/SSL Labs before creating hardening issues.
trust.proofRequired: Dated a11y/security/html reports with pass/fail rows and retest after approved fixes.
trust.whatProves: Homepage returns 200 behind Cloudflare with HSTS and x-content-type-options nosniff plus New Reward edge headers.
trust.whatCannotProve: It does not prove full security header posture, SSL Labs result, accessibility conformance, or HTML validity.
trust.notes: Header proof is public evidence only, not Cloudflare API ownership proof.

cro.dayOneTactic: Complete #120 BP1 readbacks: public routes/forms and phone links are verified, while GTM/GA4 event firing, Gravity source fields, and Clarity first-data remain open.
cro.proofRequired: Public route/form/phone/source-field map, no-submit synthetic plan, Tag Assistant/GTM Preview or GA4 DebugView/export, Gravity source-field proof, and Clarity first-data readback.
cro.whatProves: Public page includes GA4 and GTM IDs, and existing exports include GA4 event counts plus sanitized Gravity saved-entry aggregates.
cro.whatCannotProve: It does not prove GTM conversion firing quality, source preservation, phone tracking quality, Clarity behavior data, or lead quality.
cro.notes: Runtime CRO packet applied after standing approval. Public form routes: contact, quote, broker_portal, broker_application, faq. Public GTM IDs: GTM-T6TVNZ45. Public GA4 IDs: G-QZ1P2GDYBH. Public Clarity detected: no. Do not claim Clarity first-data, GTM admin proof, or Gravity source-field repair until provider readbacks exist.

attribution.dayOneTactic: Use GA4/Gravity/Clay as the measurement base, avoid CRM outcome asks in this run, and add monitoring/source-preservation checks where approved.
attribution.proofRequired: Current report continues to separate GA4 intent, Gravity saved entries, Clay handoff evidence, and unavailable outcome-quality labels.
attribution.whatProves: GSC, GA4, Gravity, Clay, authority, and recovery summaries support intent, saved-entry, and handoff reporting with corrected scope labels.
attribution.whatCannotProve: It cannot prove accepted opportunities, funded deals, revenue, or final CRM outcomes because that layer is unavailable and excluded from this run.
attribution.notes: Corrected: CRM outcome/export is not a current-run blocker; outcome/revenue proof remains unclaimed.

changes.what: Use the existing GA4/Gravity/Clay reconciliation and remove CRM outcome/export as a current-run action blocker.

Citation duplicates/conflicts: Use ledger to classify each citation as keep/repair/claim/ignore/paid-hold; avoid duplicate listings. Local pages and service-area fit: Use Utah page proof, then repair/refine remaining local/referral surface fit with live QA.
Create A3 baseline from saved DataForSEO rank tracker, GSC queries, and public AI artifact readback; do not launch new paid run without explicit approval.

Prepare a CMS-safe CLS/template repair issue and rerun PSI/CrUX/GTmetrix after quota/approval.
Create approved redirect rules for /equipment-financing/ plus equipment-to-equipment-financing variants to the canonical equipment-financing service page.
Use the existing Clarity/GTM/CMS objects only after duplicate-object readback; run current Tag Assistant/GA4 proof and no-submit/approved synthetic tests under #120.
